ogTitle: Piara Waters vs Piawaning: Climate Safety

heading: Piara Waters vs Piawaning — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Piara Waters, Western Australia and Piawaning, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Piawaning has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Piara Waters (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Piara Waters or Piawaning safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Piara Waters has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Piawaning scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Piara Waters scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Piawaning scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Piara Waters or Piawaning?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Piawaning has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
